infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: V3l0city uses precise location to calculate speed, distance, vehicle direction, and trip history during active trips.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: V3l0city uses precise location to calculate speed, distance, vehicle direction, and trip history during active trips.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: V3l0city uses precise location while the app is open to calculate speed, distance, and vehicle direction.

NSLocationTemporaryUsageDescriptionDicti.V3l0cityPreciseLocation: V3l0city needs Precise Location to calculate accurate speed, distance, and vehicle direction.

infoPlist.NSMotionUsageDescription: V3l0city uses motion sensors to smooth speed changes and provide compass fallback when GPS course is unavailable.
